title: JUDICIAL REPLACEMENT TRANSITION PLAN
subtitle: Post-Disqualification Roadmap — What Happens After McNeill Is Removed

steps.action: File MCR 2.003 disqualification order with Chief Judge
Request case reassignment to different judge in 14th Circuit
If no eligible judge, request assignment from SCAO
File emergency motion to STAY all McNeill orders pending reassignment
Serve stay motion on Emily Watson at 2160 Garland Drive, Norton Shores, MI 49441
Request new judge review ALL prior orders for bias contamination
Prepare judicial bias summary for new judge (max 10 pages)
File motion to vacate ALL orders entered by McNeill
steps.authority: MCR 2.612(C)(1)(b) — newly discovered evidence of bias

steps.action: Present evidence of McNeill's pattern: 1,127 documented violations
Request de novo hearing on custody per MCL 722.27
steps.authority: Child Custody Act, best interest factors

steps.action: Request immediate supervised parenting time restoration
File motion for psychological evaluation of BOTH parents
Present 12 best interest factors (MCL 722.23) with evidence for each
Demonstrate established custodial environment with Andrew
steps.note: L.D.W. lived with Andrew until fraudulent PPO

steps.action: Present contradiction evidence re: Emily's credibility
Present evidence of parental alienation per Factor (j)
steps.authority: MCL 722.23(j) — willingness to facilitate close relationship

steps.action: Request GAL appointment for L.D.W.
Present Andrew's 26 documented strengths (tool #157)
Move to vacate PPO (2023-5907-PP) as fraudulently obtained
Move to vacate Emily's Aug 2025 ex-parte order
steps.authority: MCR 2.612(C)(1)(d) — void (no required findings per MCL 722.27a(3))

steps.action: Request recalculation of child support from correct baseline
Request attorney fee reimbursement for Barnes's misconduct
File motion for costs incurred due to judicial bias
Establish regular parenting time schedule
steps.note: Per Michigan Friend of the Court guidelines

steps.action: Request joint legal custody
Monitor compliance with new orders
Continue federal §1983 action for damages
Continue JTC complaint against McNeill
